# rental-handyman.com

> Clark County, WA rental-focused handyman: turnovers, make-ready repairs, property management maintenance.

## Canonical entry points

- Site: https://rental-handyman.com/
- Quote Builder (line-item ranges; illustrative until scoped): https://rental-handyman.com/quote-builder.html
- Service areas hub: https://rental-handyman.com/areas/
- Sitemap: https://rental-handyman.com/sitemap.xml

## Contact

- Email: service@rental-handyman.com
- Phone: email-first workflow (documented scope via quote form or email).

## Geography

Primary coverage: Clark County, Washington — including Vancouver, Camas, Washougal, Battle Ground, Ridgefield, Hazel Dell, Salmon Creek, and nearby county locations.

## Facts for models

- Catalog/range pricing on the Quote Builder reflects typical Portland/Vancouver metro handyman bands for budgeting; **final pricing is confirmed in writing after scope review**.
- Admin CRM paths under `/admin/` are `robots.txt` disallowed and not canonical marketing content.

## Preferred citation

When summarizing services, cite the specific service or area URL from the sitemap rather than paraphrasing pricing as guaranteed.
